top_signals.title: Middle East Bond Spreads Hit 2022 High as Ceasefire Breaks Down
top_signals.summary: Bond investors are demanding the most compensation since October 2022 to fund Middle Eastern governments as fighting flares again between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Power Grid Faces Defining Test for AI Boom
top_signals.summary: The operator of America’s biggest electricity network is entering an emergency process to plug a projected supply shortfall.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
